pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in the task description and verifier scripts (verifier.py, export_result.sh), which specifically check for the presence of the 'sec24_' prefix.
Explicitly confirmed by setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which query for the standard WordPress default 'wp_' prefix to confirm the initial state.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires migrating the WordPress database prefix from the default 'wp_' to the new target 'sec24_'. This is verified by analyzing the setup_task.sh (which counts initial 'wp_' tables), export_result.sh (which counts 'sec24_' tables), and the task description instructions.
